name: Starlit Wilderlands
summary: Beautiful vanilla+ Fabric 1.20.1 exploration pack with cozy frontier settlement progression: scenic terrain, village and structure discovery, wildlife, atmosphere, practical travel/storage QoL, and warm homestead building depth without hardcore or tech bloat.
